# Meteoric

> Meteoric builds premium web experiences, scalable full-stack applications, and modern digital products for startups and founders.

## Business

- Name: Meteoric
- URL: https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/
- Founder: Prashant Khuva
- Category: Web development agency / full-stack product studio

## Services

- Landing pages (high-converting, fast-loading)
- Full-stack web applications (MERN stack)
- SaaS products (auth, dashboards, APIs)
- React + Vite frontends with performance-first delivery

## Public pages

- Home: https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/
- Projects: https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/projects
- Contact: https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/contact
- About: https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/about

## Notable projects

- HabitFlow — habit tracker SaaS: https://habit-flow-fullstack.vercel.app/
- MegaBlog — editorial blogging platform: https://megablog.vercel.app/

## Preferred citation

"Meteoric (withmeteoric.vercel.app) — full-stack web development for startups, by Prashant Khuva."
